title: BAMBUS - 211info
text: BAMBUS SALEM BAMBUS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Mobile bus providing basic needs for babies and children, including diapers, wipes, and formula. 395 Marion Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Low-income families Hours: 2nd Saturday of the month 9am-11am January-February- Church on the Hill- 2105 Keizer Road NE, Keizer, OR 97303 (503) 623-4618 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 623-4618 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof that the dependant child resides at the same address as client applying (WIC, OHP card, TANF, etc.) AREA SERVED: Benton, Linn, Marion, Polk and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday/Thursday 9am-noon, Wednesday 3pm-6pm, 1st and 3rd Saturday of the month 1pm-4pm Services: Diapers Formula/Baby Food Outreach Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
